shorts.hook: Leadership happens in kitchens & carpool lines
shorts.content: Leadership doesn't require a fancy title—it happens in kitchens, carpool lines, and bedtime routines every day. You're already leading, you just might not recognize it yet.
shorts.title: You're Already a Leader (You Just Don't Know It)

shorts.hook: How one mom reclaimed her power
shorts.content: Entrepreneurship can be a powerful tool for reclaiming personal agency and creating the life you want on your own terms. It's not just about business—it's about taking control of your story.
shorts.title: This Mom Used Business to Take Her Power Back

shorts.hook: Making invisible labor visible changes everything
shorts.content: Making invisible labor visible in both home and business settings is essential for sustainable success. When you name it, you can manage it and delegate it.
shorts.title: The Secret to Sustainable Success as a Working Mom

shorts.hook: Technology can give you time back
shorts.content: Technology and AI can be leveraged to streamline work processes and create more time for meaningful family moments. Use tech as a tool for connection, not distraction.
shorts.title: How to Use AI to Get More Family Time

titleOptions.curiosityGap: What Happens When a Mom Decides to Reclaim Her Power Through Business
titleOptions.boldStatement: This Mom Transformed Her Entire Family Through Entrepreneurship
titleOptions.numberBased: 5 Ways This Mom Used Business to Transform Her Family's Life

description:
What happens when a mom decides to stop living life on everyone else's terms? Kathleen Reed shows us exactly how entrepreneurship became her path to reclaiming personal power and transforming her entire family's wellness journey.

In this episode, discover the invisible leadership happening in your everyday moments and learn practical strategies for making your unseen work finally count.

⏰ TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 Introduction
3:15 Kathleen's entrepreneurship journey
8:30 The power of orofacial myofunctional therapy
15:45 Leadership in everyday moments
22:10 Using technology to reclaim time
28:20 Making invisible labor visible
35:15 Faith and family as business guides
42:30 The importance of rest and adventure

🔑 KEY TAKEAWAYS:
• Entrepreneurship as a tool for personal agency
• Orofacial myofunctional therapy for family wellness
• Leadership happens in kitchens and carpool lines
• Leverage AI to streamline and create family time
• Make invisible labor visible for sustainable success
• Faith and values as entrepreneurial guides
• Rest and adventure maintain perspective

🤝 CONNECT WITH GUEST:
🔗 Learn more about Kathleen's practice: https://www.westcoastmyo.com/
📚 Grab your copy of The Manage Her: https://a.co/d/ej9A37z

📺 SUBSCRIBE: Hit that subscribe button and ring the bell for weekly leadership insights for working women!

📝 FULL SHOW NOTES: https://themanageher.com/blog/how-entrepreneurship-gave-kathleen-reed-her-power-back
📊 TAKE THE QUIZ: https://themanageher.com/blog/how-entrepreneurship-gave-kathleen-reed-her-power-back

#ManageHer #WomenLeadership #MomEntrepreneur #WorkingMoms #Leadership #Entrepreneurship #WomenInBusiness #MomLife #PersonalAgency #BusinessMom

communityPosts.content:
Where do you feel like you do your most important leadership work? 🤔

🏠 In your home (kitchen, bedtime routines, family decisions)
💼 In your workplace or business
🚗 In community spaces (carpool, volunteering, etc.)
💭 In your own mindset and personal growth

Kathleen Reed reminded us that "Leadership doesn't require a fancy title—it happens in kitchens, carpool lines, and bedtime routines every day."

Your everyday moments matter more than you think! 💪

#ManageHer #Leadership #WorkingMoms

"Leadership doesn't require a fancy title—it happens in kitchens, carpool lines, and bedtime routines every day." 💫

This quote from our latest episode with Kathleen Reed hit me RIGHT in the heart. How many times do we discount the incredible leadership we're already doing?

👩‍👧‍👦 You're teaching your kids how to navigate conflict
🏠 You're managing complex family logistics
💼 You're making decisions that impact everyone around you
🎯 You're setting the tone and culture of your home

That's not just "mom stuff" — that's LEADERSHIP. 🔥

What's one way you've been a leader today that you might not have recognized?

#ManageHer #Leadership #MomLeadership #WomenLeaders
